ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Azita Rahim, Esq., via Zoom, for Colleen Owyang, Petitioner, and specially appearing for Woodford Rowland, Esq.

Ms. Rahim advises of settlement and that a Notice of Settlement was filed on Jun-21-2023. Ms. Rahim advises that the parties are not seeking approval of the settlement but there is a request for the court to retain jurisdiction. The court notes for the record that it retains jurisdiction over this matter, pursuant to CRC 664.6. The court and Ms. Rahim agree to set a future hearing RE: status of dismissal.

The matter is continued to Jul-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status hearing RE: dismissal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Sep-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeff Coons, via Zoom, for Colleen Owyang, Petitioner; Carole Gray, via Zoom, for Rodney Owyang, former Trustee.

The court and counsel discuss the status of discovery in this matter with both counsel reporting of service of discovery and meet and confer. Mr. Coons reports that there is a mediation scheduled for Aug-26-2022. The court confirms that the trust assets and records have been delivered to the temporary, successor trustee. The court advises counsel that there is no record of service to the temporary, successor trustee and reminds counsel to provide notice and to ensure the delivery of courtesy copies to the Examiner assigned to this matter.

The matter is continued to Sep-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.
